title: AGENTOBS CostPayload
description: RFC-0001 §7.2, §9 — Payload for cost attribution and rollup events in the llm.cost.* namespace. Three event types share this payload schema: llm.cost.token.recorded (per-call cost record), llm.cost.session.recorded (session-level rollup), llm.cost.attributed (manual cost attribution). The event_type determines the semantic context.

CostTokenRecordedPayload.title: CostTokenRecordedPayload
CostTokenRecordedPayload.description: Payload for llm.cost.token.recorded — per-call cost record attached to a specific LLM API call.

cost.description: RFC-0001 §9.3 — Full cost breakdown for this call.

token_usage.description: RFC-0001 §9.1 — Token usage that this cost record is computed from.

model.description: RFC-0001 §9.2 — Model that generated this call's cost.

pricing_tier.description: RFC-0001 §9.4 — Pricing rates snapshot used to compute this cost record. Include for full auditability.

span_id.description: Links this cost record to the originating span.

agent_run_id.description: Links this cost record to the originating agent run.

CostSessionRecordedPayload.title: CostSessionRecordedPayload
CostSessionRecordedPayload.description: Payload for llm.cost.session.recorded — aggregated cost rollup across a complete user session.

total_cost.description: RFC-0001 §9.3 — Aggregated cost breakdown across all calls in the session.

total_token_usage.description: RFC-0001 §9.1 — Aggregated token usage across all calls in the session.

call_count.description: Total number of LLM API calls in this session.

session_duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of the entire session in milliseconds.

models_used.description: Distinct models called during this session.

CostAttributedPayload.title: CostAttributedPayload
CostAttributedPayload.description: Payload for llm.cost.attributed — manual or derived cost attribution applied to a feature, team, or budget centre.

attribution_target.description: Identifier of the feature, team, or budget centre receiving this cost attribution.

source_event_ids.description: ULID event IDs of the source cost.token.recorded events rolled into this attribution.
